difficulty.rationale: Requires opaque cursor encode/decode with rejection of forged tokens, strict limit validation and clamping, descending keyset paging with a correct next_cursor terminator, and stability of older pages under concurrent inserts of higher-id events.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /events assigns monotonic ids starting at 1 and returns created_at.
GET /events returns items ordered by id descending (newest first).
A cursor returns only events with id strictly less than the decoded id.
next_cursor is null when no older items remain.
must_not: Skip or duplicate an older item on a later page when new events are inserted.
Accept a forged or malformed cursor.
Return more than 100 items for a clamped limit.
edge_cases: limit greater than 100 is clamped to 100.
An exact page boundary yields a next_cursor whose next page is empty.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
